prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
# You've Got This!

Listen, that task isn't getting any smaller by waiting. You've been carrying it around in your mind all morning, and that's actually harder than just diving in and doing it.

Remember why this matters to you. Remember how good it will feel when it's done. The hardest part is the first five minutes - after that, you'll find your rhythm.

Your future self is going to be so thankful you started now. Take a deep breath, break it down into steps if needed, and just begin. You're more capable than you're giving yourself credit for.

Now go show that task who's boss!
